style_name: Backseat Transit Doodle Letter Poster Style
style_summary: A realistic passenger-seat transport photo transformed into a high-energy travel poster with a central rear-view subject, electric yellow silhouette halo, oversized yellow-orange hand-drawn letters, comic rays, purple music marks, sticker icons, and cyan-white cloud swooshes.

environment_variables.SUBJECT: main driver, rider, guide, commuter, musician, courier, or traveler seen from behind
environment_variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: steering, tapping the horn, checking a mirror, pointing ahead, adjusting the radio, holding a map, or riding through the scene
environment_variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: portable speaker, route card, camera, map, drink can, luggage tag, helmet, hand drum, ticket, or featured travel object
environment_variables.LOCATION: tuk-tuk cabin, pedicab, tram, minibus, ferry deck, jeepney, taxi, cable car, shuttle, or compact city transport interior
environment_variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: windshield view, side windows, textured roof, dashboard details, mirrors, small ornaments, road, market, harbor, hills, or city street outside
environment_variables.MAIN_TEXT: short hand-drawn word such as AUTO, RIDE, GO, ZOOM, TAXI, JAM, ROLL, or DASH
environment_variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: tiny route note, travel diary caption, date line, or small sticker label
environment_variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: yellow speed rays, purple music note, cyan cloud swoosh, orange feather icon, starburst, sticker bubble, or motion dash
environment_variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: work jacket, sun-faded shirt, utility vest, travel layers, local textile scarf, helmet, cap, or casual road-trip styling

style_fidelity_anchors: Preserve the core visual identity: A realistic passenger-seat transport photo transformed into a high-energy travel poster with a central rear-view subject, electric yellow silhouette halo, oversized yellow-orange hand-drawn letters, comic rays, purple music marks, sticker icons, and cyan-white cloud swooshes.
Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS as the documentary background details and secondary context.

Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo as the base layer: wide-angle backseat perspective, real vehicle interior, natural daylight through the windows, visible material texture, dashboard and window framing, and a believable road-trip or local transit moment.
Use golden yellow fills, orange shadow shapes, burnt brown outlines, and sticker-like flat 2D finish.
Use MAIN_TEXT as the large illustrated word integrated into the composition.
Keep the same visual genre, density level, and rendering mode across new subjects.
Preserve the original balance between main subject, typography, decorative marks, and background texture.
Use the variables to change content while keeping the style system stable.

visual_deconstruction.style_category: A realistic passenger-seat transport photo transformed into a high-energy travel poster with a central rear-view subject, electric yellow silhouette halo, oversized yellow-orange hand-drawn letters, comic rays, purple music marks, sticker icons, and cyan-white cloud swooshes.
visual_deconstruction.composition_logic: A reusable poster/image system where the subject, prop, location, text, and accent variables change while the layout grammar remains fixed.
visual_deconstruction.subject_treatment: The subject is driven by SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION, with wardrobe or visual treatment supplied by WARDROBE_STYLE.
visual_deconstruction.background_system: LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS provide the scene, texture, spatial cues, and secondary details without changing the style family.
visual_deconstruction.type_and_graphics: MAIN_TEXT, SECONDARY_TEXT, and ACCENT_SYMBOL control readable text, microcopy, stickers, marks, arrows, bursts, or other graphic accents.
visual_deconstruction.content_boundary: The negative prompt and source_content_to_avoid list prevent direct recreation of source subjects, marks, brands, watermarks, and story premises.

image_treatment.finish: finished AI-image prompt output, not a wireframe, SVG, HTML mockup, or raw storyboard note
image_treatment.texture: preserve the material, paper, grain, marker, photographic, or print texture described by the style summary and prompt_template
image_treatment.lighting: keep the lighting behavior implied by the reference style rather than replacing it with a generic cinematic look

composition.layout: Keep the subject hierarchy, crop behavior, framing, and density described by the prompt_template.
composition.subject: Use SUBJECT and SUBJECT_ACTION as the primary visual anchor, scaled and positioned according to the style identity.
composition.scene: Use LOCATION and BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS for setting detail without changing the visual genre.
composition.text: Place MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT as designed graphic elements, not as long paragraphs.

typography.main_text: MAIN_TEXT should be short, legible, and visually integrated with the poster or image system.
typography.secondary_text: SECONDARY_TEXT should read as small caption, label, route note, slogan, or microcopy.
typography.style: Match the typography behavior described by the style summary and prompt_template, including scale, distortion, texture, and placement.

color_palette.palette_behavior: Use the dominant colors, contrast rhythm, and accent-color logic implied by the style summary.
color_palette.background: Keep the background color family consistent with the reference style.
color_palette.accents: Use ACCENT_SYMBOL and graphic marks to carry small high-contrast color moments.

design_rules: Use BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS as the documentary background details and secondary context.
Use WARDROBE_STYLE for clothing, styling, surface treatment, and character details.

Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo as the base layer: wide-angle backseat perspective, real vehicle interior, natural daylight through the windows, visible material texture, dashboard and window framing, and a believable road-trip or local transit moment.
Graphic overlay: trace the central subject with a thick electric yellow hand-drawn halo.
Add oversized chunky hand-drawn letters spelling MAIN_TEXT around the subject, tilted and partly cropped by the frame.
Use golden yellow fills, orange shadow shapes, burnt brown outlines, and sticker-like flat 2D finish.
Add ACCENT_SYMBOL with purple music marks, yellow comic speed rays from the corners, cyan-white cloud or wind swooshes along the lower frame, small sticker bubbles, and playful motion strokes.
do: Replace subjects, props, locations, text, and story details through examples.values.
Keep prompt_template placeholders declared in environment_variables.
Preserve the style_fidelity_anchors when adapting the JSON to a new image request.
Use short, readable text values for MAIN_TEXT and SECONDARY_TEXT.
prompt_template:
Create an image in backseat-transit-doodle-letter-poster-style.

Aspect ratio: {ASPECT_RATIO}.

Scene: {SUBJECT} {SUBJECT_ACTION}, with {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}, inside or on {LOCATION}. Background details: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}. Style the subject with {WARDROBE_STYLE}. Use a realistic passenger-seat travel photo as the base layer: wide-angle backseat perspective, real vehicle interior, natural daylight through the windows, visible material texture, dashboard and window framing, and a believable road-trip or local transit moment.

Graphic overlay: trace the central subject with a thick electric yellow hand-drawn halo. Add oversized chunky hand-drawn letters spelling "{MAIN_TEXT}" around the subject, tilted and partly cropped by the frame. Use golden yellow fills, orange shadow shapes, burnt brown outlines, and sticker-like flat 2D finish.

Add {ACCENT_SYMBOL}, purple music marks, yellow comic speed rays from the corners, cyan-white cloud or wind swooshes along the lower frame, small sticker bubbles, and playful motion strokes. Keep the overlays bold but preserve the subject silhouette, steering gesture, and forward window view.

Text: use "{MAIN_TEXT}" as the large illustrated word. Add "{SECONDARY_TEXT}" only as tiny clean sticker text if it does not clutter the image. Do not include watermarks, usernames, creator IDs, QR codes, platform logos, app marks, copied brand logos, or copied jacket graphics.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, QR code, platform logo, app interface marks, copied person, copied exact vehicle, copied brand logo, copied jacket graphic, long paragraphs, crowded small text, corporate transport ad, luxury car campaign, full vector illustration, 3D chrome letters, glossy balloon type, clay render, dark horror, dystopian chase, cyberpunk city, gritty crime scene, overlays blocking the subject, overlays blocking the windshield

values.SUBJECT: an auto-rickshaw driver seen from behind
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: steering forward while adjusting a tiny radio
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a portable radio and route card
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: textured roof lining, bright windshield view, small mirrors, painted dashboard, side rails, roadside greenery, and warm cabin red details
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: purple music notes and yellow speed rays
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: olive work jacket, sun-faded collar, and casual driver styling

values.SUBJECT: a harbor tram conductor seen from behind
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: checking the mirror while rolling past the waterfront

values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: cyan cloud swoosh and orange feather icons
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: navy utility vest, striped shirt, cap, and transit-worker styling

values.SUBJECT: a night-market pedicab guide seen from the passenger seat
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: pointing toward a food street while pedaling
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a lantern map and portable speaker
values.LOCATION: a pedicab passenger view through a busy market lane
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: neon food stalls, hanging signs without readable brand names, side canopy fabric, metal handlebar, baskets, wet pavement, and warm street lights
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: hot magenta starburst and purple sound strokes
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: yellow rain shell, black crossbody strap, and street-guide styling

values.SUBJECT: a mountain shuttle driver seen from behind
values.SUBJECT_ACTION: steering around a switchback with one hand on the wheel
values.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: a folded trail map and metal thermos
values.LOCATION: a small shuttle bus interior above a valley road
values.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: wide front windshield, dashboard compass, hanging strap, fabric seat backs, pine trees, valley road, bright mountain sky, and side window reflections
values.ACCENT_SYMBOL: yellow corner rays and cyan-white wind swooshes
values.WARDROBE_STYLE: canvas vest, rolled sleeves, cap, and outdoors transit styling
